name: Dragon Hunt
short_description: DRAGON HUNT is a classic bricks destroying game, where to win a level you need to destroy the so called dragon stones (yellow and red bricks)
detailed_description:
Special Offer


About the Game

WHAT IS DRAGON HUNT?


DRAGON HUNT is a classic bricks destroying game, where to win a level you need to destroy the so called dragon stones (yellow and red bricks)

THE SETTING


The world of Dragon Hunt is set in cyber space with 18 levels to complete.

THE GAME


You use arrow or WSAD keys to rotate the wheel and the game is very easy to learn.

As you progress through the levels it will get harder and harder to master the game.

FEATURES


Classic brick destroying game

Multiple types of stones (bricks) to destroy

18 levels to complete

Easy to learn, hard to master with each level increasing difficulty and complexity
